result:
Wrote `index.md` for the expedition with synthesis prose tying the four angles together.

Cover: `scout-illustrator` returned `wrote cover.svg`, included as `cover: cover.svg` in frontmatter.

Synthesis highlights: all four children converge on the same three-serve shortlist and the contact-point principle; flagged one cross-child contradiction (Hodges 2–3/game vs Lodziak up to 80%, reconciled tactically); merged the children's separate timelines into a unified 6–8 week schedule with a Month 2+ reverse-pendulum upgrade gate; called out legality as a low-frequency hazard; left the open question of post-2000-rating ceiling, which none of the children covered.
